title: Playpark MC
description: A QoL modpack made for Playpark MC's Survival server to enable better performance along with voicechat
body:
This modpack was made for the Survival server hosted by Playpark MC, it aims to provide good performance aswell as many QoL improvements.

The pack is purposefully made lightweight since the only necessary component is  the Voicechat mod and why not make Minecraft run better and smoother at the same time.
